profile_summary.reason: nsys profile waited indefinitely for re-parented vLLM worker processes after the benchmark passed; GPU compute apps were already gone, and no .nsys-rep/.sqlite had been written before the profiling process was terminated.

runtime_observations_from_log: DeepSeek's fp8_ds_mla KV cache format was used.
FP8 indexer cache was used for the Lightning Indexer.
MXFP4 MoE used the MARLIN backend.
CUDA graph capture used PIECEWISE and FULL decode capture sizes [1, 2, 4].
custom all-reduce registered CUDA graph addresses during graph setup.
comparability: Macro throughput and code-path selection are usable. Per-kernel or per-graph-node costs are not usable because the node-trace profile did not export.
